testcase.name: test_01_vendor_login_success
testcase.failure: tests/test_vendor_rbac_final.py:66: in test_01_vendor_login_success assert data["user"]["store_id"] is not None, "Vendor should have store_id" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'store_id'

testcase.name: test_10_vendor_cannot_create_item_for_other_store

failure.message: AssertionError: Should deny access to other stores: 422 assert 422 in [403, 404] + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_vendor_rbac_final.py:246: in test_10_vendor_cannot_create_item_for_other_store assert response.status_code in [403, 404], f"Should deny access to other stores: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Should deny access to other stores: 422 E assert 422 in [403, 404] E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
